query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS total_enriched,
  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL AND rating != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN amazonUrl IS NOT NULL AND amazonUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_amazon_url
FROM book_profiles;

  SUM(CASE WHEN coverImageUrl IS NOT NULL AND coverImageUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_cover,
  SUM(CASE WHEN summary IS NOT NULL AND summary != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_summary,
  SUM(CASE WHEN rating IS NOT NULL AND rating != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_rating,
  SUM(CASE WHEN amazonUrl IS NOT NULL AND amazonUrl != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS has_amazon_url
FROM book_profiles;
